video_title: BINGE the Best of #DDD Across All 50 States of Flavortown with Guy Fieri 🇺🇸 | Food Network

restaurants.name: Maryland Crab Shack
restaurants.guy_intro: Here in South Baltimore, Maryland, we're diving into some perfectly seasoned Maryland crab, carrying on the old Maryland Crab Shack tradition.

dishes.description: Blue crabs steamed with a custom seasoning blend, served with fresh corn on the cob.
dishes.guy_response: They're very rich. It's buttery. It's sweet. The salt complements it really well. The seasoning on the crab is pretty outstanding. Wow. Oh, that's good. It's delicious.

dishes.description: Crab cakes made with pure jumbo lump crab meat, minimal binder, baked until golden.
dishes.guy_response: Super fresh. Mm-hmm. I'm not getting over citrus. I'm not getting over mustard. I'm not getting over Old Bay. Mm-hmm. Tasting the crab. Everybody's working together to enhance. Enhance that jumbo lump. Wow.

restaurants.name: Pinky's
restaurants.guy_intro: Here in Charlotte, North Carolina, we're checking out a spot known for its big burgers and unique takes on classic dishes.

dishes.description: Three five-ounce beef patties, three slices of American cheese, house southern slaw, mustard, chopped onions, and house-made chili, served on a bun.
dishes.guy_response: Greg, I'm telling you, it's fantastic. You're attacking this thing. It's like a coyote got a hold of it. Triple G, sir? It's a sloppy piece of equipment, but it's delicious and filling.

dishes.description: Shrimp dipped in a sweet corn dog batter and deep-fried until golden brown.
dishes.guy_response: They're so good. It tastes like a corn dog. Sweet, crunchy batter. Straight from the fair. Straight from the fair. Straight from the fair. Not salty.
